posts.author: Florian22630 (Florian DUROUSSET)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello
i would like that when a team is assigned to an item, it also assign its team members (as i have an automation creating a mirror item for the assigned persons and it doesn’t works with the teams but only with the persons).
Basically, there is an automation existing : when a person is assigned, then generate a mirror item

But the thing is, when we assign the team, this automation doesn’t works.
So it would be suitable that when a team is assign, then it assign also the team members.
Or, ideally, to allow the automation of when we assign someone (including teams), then the mirror column populate
